modmenu.descriptionTranslation.declinabl:
Inflects killer names in death messages for languages with grammatical cases.
Supports custom declensions (case marking) through resource pack translation keys.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.declinable-de: Inflects killer names in death messages for languages with grammatical cases.
declinable-death-messages.config.title: Declinable Death Messages Config
declinable-death-messages.config.names.t: Use keys of the form '[death message].by.[name]' to decline player names and renamed entity names.
declinable-death-messages.config.entitie: Use keys of the form '[death message].by.[mod ID].[entity]' and '[death message].by.[entity]' to decline unrenamed entity names.
declinable-death-messages.config.tooltip: If the key is missing, returns the original entity name.
declinable-death-messages.config.origina: Shows the original death message on hover
declinable-death-messages.config.message: Use keys of the form '[death message].by.[entity/name].message' to adapt death messages for the language grammar.
If the key is missing, returns the original death message.
declinable-death-messages.config.tooltip: Disable this if your resource pack or a server resource pack abuses this feature.
Additionally, you can enable advanced tooltips (%s + %s) to display the killer's original name when hovering over their name.
Additionally, with advanced tooltips enabled, you can hover over the killer's name to see their original name.
